title: Fox Night Light for Kids, Cute Silicone Lamp with Rechargeable Dimmable 20 Mins Timer, Kids Bedside Decoration Light, Birthday Holiday Christmas Gifts Idea for Baby Girl Boy Friend
features: 𝗖𝗛𝗔𝗥𝗠𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗚𝗡: Fall in love with the adorable fox night light!A slumbering fox is captivating . Its kawaii shape brings vitality to any space while its soft light creates a soothing ambiance in the bedroom, living room, bedside, or study—making it the perfect companion for your kids

𝗦𝗔𝗙𝗘 𝗖𝗢𝗠𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗜𝗢𝗡: Made of BPA-free silicone material, the fox lamp is safe and eco-friendly for your baby. The soft LED anti-blue light effectively shields children's eyes and includes a 20-minute timer to create a comfortable sleeping environment

𝗘𝗔𝗦𝗬 𝗧𝗢 𝗨𝗦𝗘: Built in 1200mAh rechargeable lithium battery with 2 brightness levels, the animal lamp is perfect as a bedtime reading light or night light. Simply tap or squeeze to turn on/off, making it easy for your child to use and stress-free. It also doubles as a nursing night light for mothers

𝗖𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗩𝗘 𝗚𝗜𝗙𝗧: It's not only a great companion for boys and girls, but also a stress-relief toy for friends, teenagers, adults, men and women. A thoughtful gift idea for birthdays, Christmas, Easter, Halloween, Thanksgiving—everyone will be charmed by its cuteness
𝗔𝗙𝗧𝗘𝗥-𝗦𝗔𝗟𝗘 𝗦𝗘𝗥𝗩𝗜𝗖𝗘: Every Silicone lamp is meticulously tested before shipment. Get in touch with us for any question or issue you may have post-purchase—your satisfaction is paramount
